creator: rvernica@gmail.com
text:
I am pulling and running the official postgres image from https://hub.docker.com/_/postgres/ When I run it I get:

> docker run --name some-postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mysecretpassword -d postgres
26f33210d9cd1162a7a7633148c2b5db30d868e5578cea2dbaab9463670ba7fc
> docker logs some-postgres
/docker-entrypoint.sh: line 18: /usr/local/bin/gosu: cannot execute binary file: Exec format error
